notes: No published machine-readable spec for the Mojatax VFD API. The adaptor exposes only generic post()/request() helpers; post() prefixes paths with /client/ (confirmed in src/Adaptor.js). Authored a best-effort focused OpenAPI 3.0.3 from the vendor site and adaptor docs. CreateInvoice (POST /client/CreateInvoice) is the only endpoint shown in the examples; GetToken (auth: client_id/password -> access_token) and CancelInvoice are plausible companions derived from the documented VFD/TRA flow and are marked best-effort. Server URL and receipt field details are placeholders and should be verified against Mojatax's private docs.
